name: AlsoAsked.com
highlight_text: Best For: Ranking on SERPs & Keyword Research
description:
How does AlsoAsked.com help agencies?

AlsoAsked helps you find the questions people are asking so that you can create the right kind of content to educate your audience and rank better on SERPs. It also helps you find the zero-volume keywords to get a more competitive edge. These questions are based on real Google searches. 

Source: AlsoAsked

Features 

  • Helps you get a detailed list of questions that will help you visualize intent and relationships between questions by exporting them quickly as PNGs
  • Bulk search allows you to conduct People Also Ask research at scale, uploading up to 1,000 questions at once in a CSV and getting a zip download
  • Helps you programmatically interact with Also Asked data using the sync/async API with webhook support. 
  • One can also manage their previous searches from your dashboard 
  • Deep dive into a topic with the option of deep search and get access to 150 questions per day
  • Helps you plan your content, whether it's for a video, a blog you’re writing or working on a content brief

Pros 

  • One can never run out of content ideas due to the vast number of questions that are available to pick and choose and create content from 
  • Helps SEO experts save a lot of time with keyword research, by providing them with image exports to writers or bulk searches that Chrome scraping extensions can't achieve. 
  • Also Asked provides you with the data directly from Google and on what information is likely to be expected. 
  • It also offers location-specific data, based on countries for now.

Cons

  • Their data visualization can improve and should be much more intuitive. 
  • People say it's not very granular in its data

Pricing

Starts at $12 Per Month. Also offers 3 free trial searches
